items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Waitlist to confirmed booking flow', but the evidence does not provide sufficient details on the actual behavior of the system in this scenario. While the linked use case outlines the waitlist process, it lacks concrete evidence of the scenario being executed or the expected results being captured. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed based on the current evidence.
